x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Post-incident review data allows Now Assist to identify systemic failure patterns and generate recurrence prevention recommendations. Low PIR coverage means this AI capability has no historical data.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Link all resolved P1 incidents to a Problem record using the OOB Problem field (problem_id). Enforce via a mandatory field policy on P1 resolution or an automated workflow that creates a problem record for every P1. Do not use custom relationship tables — Now Assist reads the OOB problem_id reference field.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c2d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Post-incident review data allows Now Assist to identify systemic failure patterns and generate recurrence prevention recommendations. Low PIR coverage means this AI capability has no historical data.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Post-Incident Review (PIR) Linkage Rate</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var totalGr = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    totalGr.addQuery('priority', 1);
    totalGr.addQuery('state', 'IN', '6,7');
    totalGr.addAggregate('COUNT');
    totalGr.query();
    var total = totalGr.next() ? parseInt(totalGr.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No resolved/closed P1 incidents found',
            finding: 'No resolved P1 incidents found. PIR linkage cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var linkedGr = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    linkedGr.addQuery('priority', 1);
    linkedGr.addQuery('state', 'IN', '6,7');
    linkedGr.addQuery('problem_id', '!=', '');
    linkedGr.addAggregate('COUNT');
    linkedGr.query();
    var linked = linkedGr.next() ? parseInt(linkedGr.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((linked / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = linked + ' of ' + total + ' resolved P1 incidents linked to a Problem record (' + pct + '%)';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of P1 incidents linked to a problem record. Now Assist can surface recurring P1 patterns and PIR-driven recommendations.' };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of P1 incidents linked to a problem (target: 80%). PIR recommendations will have incomplete data.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of P1 incidents are linked to a problem record. Now Assist cannot surface recurring major incident patterns or PIR insights.' };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005975</number>
<order>360</order>
<remediation_guidance>Link all resolved P1 incidents to a Problem record using the OOB Problem field (problem_id). Enforce via a mandatory field policy on P1 resolution or an automated workflow that creates a problem record for every P1. Do not use custom relationship tables — Now Assist reads the OOB problem_id reference field.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c2d</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
